SYSCON

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x51810000
Size:
0x4008
Source:
syscon_rf.rdl

Description

System Control Registers. Source: TRM Part 1, Table 3-3.

Contents

Offset Identifier Name
0x0000 dynm_csr_en MCPU dynamic CSR enable
0x0004 dynm_csr_gnt MCPU dynamic CSR grant status (RO)
0x0008 cpu_qos MCPU / D2D AXI QoS control
0x000C - -
0x0324 noc_cfg0 NOC watchdog enable — SNOC/MNOC/RNOC/LNOC ports
0x0328 noc_cfg1 NOC watchdog enable — CNOC ports
0x032C - -
0x0330 dsp_cfg DSP configuration (ARM CoreSight signals; not used in practice)
0x0334 - -
0x0354 mcput_cfg8 MCPU system JTAG ID and debug reset enable
0x0358 - -
0x0368 lpcpu_cfg0 LPCPU JTAG ID
0x036C scpu_cfg SCPU JTAG ID
0x0370 dma_cfg LSP peripheral DMA channel selection (0=DMA0, 1=DMA1)
0x0374 - -
0x03B8 pcie_cfg PCIe ATS / NW misc info configuration
0x03BC jtag_chain_ctrl JTAG chain bypass control (1=bypassed/excluded from chain)
0x03C0 aon_int_mux AON peripheral interrupt destination (0=U84, 1=LPCPU, 2/3=SCPU where applicable)
0x03C4 - -
0x03CC noc_ddrt_lowpower NOC→DDR port low-power Q-channel (csysreq RW, csysack/cactive RO)
0x03D0 npu_tbu_power NPU TBU Q-channel power-down and clock-gate control/status
0x03D4 vc_tlb_qchanel VC codec TLB Q-channel control/status (VD/VE/JD/JE)
0x03D8 tbu0234_qchanel TBU 0/2/3/4 Q-channel control/status (qactive defaults 1 = on)
0x03DC tbu7_tcu_qchannel TCU Q-channel control/status (tbu7 bits undocumented in TRM)
0x03E0 - -
0x03F0 ddrt_trace_ctrl DDR trace trigger/finish control
0x03F4 ddrt01_axi_lp DDR controller AXI low-power Q-channel (csysreq RW, rest RO)
0x03F8 dsp_tbu_lp DSP TBU Q-channel control/status (dsp0/dsp1; [31:16] undocumented in TRM)
0x03FC mmu_clear_int MMU interrupt clear
0x0400 aon_timer_pause AON timer pause control
0x0404 audio_mclk_oectrl I2S MCLK output enable
0x0408 - -
0x0600 hsp_status HSP DMA AHB bus status (RO)
0x0604 vc_status VC subsystem idle status (RO)
0x0608 mcpu_status MCPU cluster status (RO)
0x060C sec_status Security subsystem status (RO)
0x0610 - -
0x0614 lpcpu_status LPCPU cluster status and debug-reset enable
0x0618 scpu_status SCPU cluster status and debug-reset enable
0x061C aon_peri_status AON peripheral enable status (RO)
0x0620 die_status Die identity and strap status (RO)
0x0624 lsp_status LSP timer enable status (RO)
0x0628 pcie_status PCIe ATS / NW misc info status (RO)
0x062C usb_curpwr_state USB current power state and power-switch control
0x0630 usb0_debug_u2pmu_low USB0 U2 PMU debug bits [31:0] (RO)
0x0634 usb0_debug_u2pmu_med USB0 U2 PMU debug bits [63:32] (RO)
0x0638 usb0_debug_u2pmu_hi USB0 U2 PMU debug bits [67:64] (RO)
0x063C usb0_debug_u3pmu_low USB0 U3 PMU debug bits [31:0] (RO)
0x0640 usb0_debug_u3pmu_hi USB0 U3 PMU debug bits [38:32] (RO)
0x0644 usb0_pmu_config USB0 PMU configuration strap
0x0648 usb1_debug_u2pmu_low USB1 U2 PMU debug bits [31:0] (RO)
0x064C usb1_debug_u2pmu_med USB1 U2 PMU debug bits [63:32] (RO)
0x0650 usb1_debug_u2pmu_hi USB1 U2 PMU debug bits [67:64] (RO)
0x0654 usb1_debug_u3pmu_low USB1 U3 PMU debug bits [31:0] (RO)
0x0658 usb1_debug_u3pmu_hi USB1 U3 PMU debug bits [38:32] (RO)
0x065C usb1_pmu_config USB1 PMU configuration strap
0x0660 aon_timers_en AON timer enabled status (RO; bits = per-channel enable mask)
0x0664 - -
0x0668 test_reg[4] Debug scratch pad registers (ROM boot progress)
0x0678 anaip_debug_ctrl AON analog IP test mux control
0x067C aon_i2c0_status AON I2C0 debug bus status (RO)
0x0680 aon_i2c1_status AON I2C1 debug bus status (RO)
0x0684 - -
0x0694 d2d_stauts D2D serdes status and control
0x0698 d2d_ctrl D2D subsystem control
0x069C - -
0x1000 scpu_qos SCPU AXI QoS
0x1004 scpu_sid SCPU MMU stream ID
0x1008 - -
0x2000 lpcpu_qos LPCPU AXI QoS
0x2004 lpcpu_sid LPCPU MMU stream ID
0x2008 - -
0x3000 dma1_qos DMA1 AXI QoS
0x3004 dma1_sid DMA1 MMU stream ID
0x3008 - -
0x4000 sec_qos Security subsystem (SPAcc/PKA/TRNG) AXI QoS
0x4004 sec_sid Security subsystem MMU stream ID
